items.name_en: 💕【New Arrival】GG Emblem Series Card Holder with Strap
items.name_cn:
💕【New Arrival】GG Emblem Series Card Holder with Strap
The GG Emblem series reinterprets classic patterns with creative design and innovative functions, crafted as a future collectible. This beige and dark brown card holder redefines the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from new GG monogram canvas. The multi-compartment design is practical, and the brown leather strap adds texture.
Model: 819121.
Size: 10(L) x 7(W)
Color: Beige PVC / Original Leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 🔥Every year Luo releases a unique white canvas bag 💄and it's always very popular. The year before last there was the Toast bag, last year the Paula's bag, and this year we welcome the latest Cushion Tote bag~~Simply amazing! ✅👻❤️Featuring exclusive custom Taiwan-imported canvas paired with imported calfskin 💥A drawstring-style opening with knotted cords at the four corners, and an internal fixed "support" structure to maintain shape. The style is very novel and unique 💋adding practicality to the casual open-top bag. 👍👍👍A solid choice for vacation and commuting~💯
items.name_cn:
🔥Every year Luo releases a unique white canvas bag 💄and it's always very popular. The year before last there was the Toast bag, last year the Paula's bag, and this year we welcome the latest Cushion Tote bag~~Simply amazing! ✅👻❤️Featuring exclusive custom Taiwan-imported canvas paired with imported calfskin 💥A drawstring-style opening with knotted cords at the four corners, and an internal fixed "support" structure to maintain shape. The style is very novel and unique 💋adding practicality to the casual open-top bag. 👍👍👍A solid choice for vacation and commuting~💯
Size: 32CM~26CM~16CM
Style No.: 8015
Color: Canvas Brown

items.name_en: 🔥Balloon New Small Canvas Bucket Bag 👜It looks like a bucket bag from the outside, using strong calfskin 🐮for the round bottom, plus Napa soft leather for the body. The leather is super comfortable and delicate, making its silhouette round like a balloon 🎈A Loewe💎we Anagram dice 🎲is a highlight on the knotted leather cord ✨Structured yet relaxed drawstring bag, using an intriguing structure to achieve a classic proportion and clean lining silhouette 🤎A rigid external base supports the soft inner pouch 🎀ensuring a sturdy design 🥰Holds a soft interior body comfortably. Lightweight and comfortable to wear. This version is made of raffia and leather *Adjustable shoulder strap 🧸Drawstring closure. Crossbody or hand carry, multiple ways to wear *Stylish, youthful and versatile 💐

items.name_en: 🔥Balloon New Large Canvas Bucket Bag 👜 It looks like a bucket bag on the outside, using strong calf leather for the round bottom, and napa soft cowhide for the bag body. The leather is super comfortable and delicate and soft, making its outline round like a balloon 🎈. A Loewe 💎 Anagram dice 🎲 is a highlight on the knotted leather cord ✨. Structured yet relaxed drawstring bag, using an intriguing structure to achieve a classic proportion and clean lining silhouette 🤎. A rigid external base supports the soft inner pouch 🎀, ensuring a sturdy design 🥰 that holds the soft bag body comfortably. Lightweight and comfortable to wear. This version is made of palm fiber and cowhide *Adjustable shoulder strap 🧸. Buckle closure. Crossbody or handbag carry, multiple ways to wear *Stylish, youthful and versatile 💐

items.name_en: New In Stock 🅰️🅰️ CE New Camille 16 Soft
items.name_cn:
New In Stock 🅰️🅰️ CE New Camille 16 Soft
CE Camille new arrival quietly returns to a minimalist elegant style. You can see this from the latest member of the 16 Soft series, the Camille 16 Soft bag. This new design retains the series' signature soft lines and outlines a casual composure with a Hobo silhouette, showing this isn't a bag trying to attract attention, but capturing hearts with low-key charm.
The Camille 16 Soft uses smooth calfskin with a natural sheen. The overall shape is fluid yet structured. The front features the brand's classic 16 metal lock detail. Without excessive decoration, it perfectly showcases taste. Camille 16 Soft comes in Medium and Small sizes. Colors range from steady black and classic tan to warm white and light sand. Every tone echoes the brand's commitment to eternal aesthetics. Just casually holding it gives an effortless chic look.
Can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody. Rotating lock closure.
1 main compartment, 1 interior zip pocket.
Includes 1 removable shoulder strap and 1 removable adjustable long strap.
Model: 120693
Color: Brown
Size: 24.5x21.5x5cm
(with original packaging)

specs.rawTitle:
New In Stock 🅰️🅰️ CE New Camille 16 Soft
CE Camille new arrival quietly returns to a minimalist elegant style. You can see this from the latest member of the 16 Soft series, the Camille 16 Soft bag. This new design retains the series' signature soft lines and outlines a casual composure with a Hobo silhouette, showing this isn't a bag trying to attract attention, but capturing hearts with low-key charm.
The Camille 16 Soft uses smooth calfskin with a natural sheen. The overall shape is fluid yet structured. The front features the brand's classic 16 metal lock detail. Without excessive decoration, it perfectly showcases taste. Camille 16 Soft comes in Medium and Small sizes. Colors range from steady black and classic tan to warm white and light sand. Every tone echoes the brand's commitment to eternal aesthetics. Just casually holding it gives an effortless chic look.
Can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody. Rotating lock closure.
1 main compartment, 1 interior zip pocket.
Includes 1 removable shoulder strap and 1 removable adjustable long strap.
Model: 120693
Color: Brown
Size: 24.5x21.5x5cm
(with original packaging)
